description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The body is primarily constructed from dark metal with a matte finish, accented by a wooden or polymer pistol grip and a blue magazine. The rifle includes a visible spring mechanism and a complex underbarrel assembly, possibly for recoil absorption or an auxiliary function. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a muzzle device attached at the end. The scope has a flip-up lens cover, and the overall build is compact yet heavy-duty, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. Various mechanical components, such as adjustment knobs and rails, are visible, indicating modularity and customization potential.
description: A tactical rifle with a mounted scope, short thick barrel, and a blue magazine, featuring a robust metal body and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the mounted scope, spring mechanism, blue magazine, and underbarrel assembly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, scope alignment, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, spring mechanism, and the detailed structure of the underbarrel components.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the scope's eyepiece, pistol grip, and the alignment of the rifle's main axis.
